name: @virtuals-protocol/acp-node-v2
description: The Agent Commerce Protocol (ACP) Node SDK v2 is a ground-up rewrite of the ACP Node SDK. It replaces the callback/phase-based model with an event-driven architecture built around `AcpAgent` and `JobSession`, with first-class LLM tool integration, pluggab
